# BOAkinola & Co

Chartered Accountants in Lagos, licensed by the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria (ICAN) on 24 May 1990.

## Services
- Auditing: [/services/auditing](/services/auditing)
- Accounting: [/services/accounting](/services/accounting)
- Taxation: [/services/taxation](/services/taxation)
- Value Added Tax (VAT): [/services/value-added-tax](/services/value-added-tax)
- Debt Recovery: [/services/debt-recovery](/services/debt-recovery)
- Management Consultancy: [/services/management-consultancy](/services/management-consultancy)
- Company Formation & Secretarial Services: [/services/company-formation](/services/company-formation)
- Receivership & Liquidation: [/services/receivership-liquidation](/services/receivership-liquidation)
- Investigation: [/services/investigation](/services/investigation)
- Reconciliation of Accounts: [/services/reconciliation](/services/reconciliation)
- Asset Verification & Valuation: [/services/asset-verification](/services/asset-verification)
- Training: [/services/training](/services/training)
- Agricultural Extension Services: [/services/agricultural-extension](/services/agricultural-extension)
